---
title: "Portfolio"
listing:
  contents:
    - research.qmd
    - presentations.qmd
    - msrip_symposium.qmd
    - xcite_dashboard.qmd
    - project_links.yml      # Automatically generates cards for all repos listed inside
  type: grid         # Creates the "Card" look
  sort: "date desc"
  categories: true   # Adds filter buttons (e.g., "R", "SQL", "Consulting")
  fields: [image, date, title, description]
---

## Selected Works

Below are case studies demonstrating my work in Econometrics and Data Science.
